channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cars blocking fire access and driveway, 22nd June
item.description:
Fire access and emergency access blocked. Also 4 garages meaning cars blocked in.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox cub on council green in a council wheelie bin., 22nd June
item.description:
This is the 3rd time of reporting this, there was a dead fox cub in my front garden, I removed it and placed it in a bin bag and then wrapped it in a white cotton bag because it had started to smell and had flies over it, I then placed it in an abandoned wheelie bin that has been on the green for many months (number 16a written on it) which is under the tree nearest the parking bays, for whatever reason my reports were removed and the fox cub is still in the bin and in this heat it absolutely smells and will only get worse, you can now smell it at a distance and it is not pleasant at all, I am a council tenant and the wheelie bin is on a council green, so cannot understand why it has not being collected or why both my reports were removed and ignored, can this be sorted ASAP.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sibthorpe Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 nitrous oxide canisters, 22nd June
item.description:
2 nitrous oxide containers. By the green comms box opposite the nhs clinic 14 The Crescent BR3 1DU.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, The Crescent, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd June
item.description:
Blocking vehicle access to Thames Water Facility

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battle Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover is missing, 22nd June
item.description:
The access point / manhole is outside 196 Tulse Hill. Cover is completely missing. It's in the middle of the pavement. There are lots of children using that street every day, it's quite dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 192, Tulse Hill, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging bushes and nettles, 22nd June
item.description:
Overhanging bushes and nettles
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camden Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress on elmdene road se18 6tz, 22nd June
item.description:
This mattress has been here for a couple days now and it is disgusting to look at and blocks the path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmdene Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing dog poo bin. Spring Vale entrance to Martens Grove park, 22nd June
item.description:
Bin used to get emptied on Mondays but has been missed for the last 2 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martens Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed MoT expired abandoned vehicle, 22nd June
item.description:
Car has no MoT for over a year and is untaxed and therefore uninsured. Window open and attracting litter being posted through. Parking here is limited and abondoned vehicles a nuisance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harold Avenue, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped fridge, 22nd June
item.description:
The flytipped wood has been collected but for some reason the fridge was left behind…

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mildenhall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rat infestation, 22nd June
item.description:
Rats seen again in the vegetation along the side of St Mark's Church, inside Mark Street Gardens.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mark Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins need emptying, 22nd June
item.description:
All the bins to the south of the waterlink way (which is closed) are full and now litter is being chucked around everywhere. This side feels like it’s been forgotten - kindly ensure the bins are emptied on a frequent and regular basis to avoid litter and attracting rodents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adam Close, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plenty of rubbish bins and tyoing left infront of the property, 22nd June
item.description:
All these rubbish bags, bins, and furniture have been dumped in front of 89 Maple Road for a few days now. It is starting to smell really bad, and I am quite worried that it will get worse this week due to the heatwave.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Howard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped mattress, 22nd June
item.description:
On pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole over 2 inches deep and 12 inches across at the crossing point of this signalised junction., 22nd June
item.description:
Deep pothole causes vehicles to twist and during wet weather splashing pedestrians waiting adjacent on the footway at this signaling junction. Opposite Bromley Council offices. Shameful.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Masons Hill, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 chairs left in Lamlash St Garden, Hayles St end., 22nd June
item.description:
Please remove as they are not required by the garden.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Elliott's Row, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents of 28 Glenesk Road flytipping, 22nd June
item.description:
Whilst walking my dogs at 20:45 on Monday evening, I witnessed the residents (women in black around 50 years old and a young boy around 14 years old with dark fringe long wavy hair) leave their driveway and through at least one black bag of rubbish over the railway bridge wall on the park side. I regularly see bulky rubbish outside their house but this is the first time I witnessed them throw it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenesk Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 22nd June
item.description:
Rubbish has been left

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Byron Close, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter scattered along the border, 22nd June
item.description:
Litter scattered along the border

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Manor Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall between JD Sport & Iceland, 22nd June
item.description:
Please clean off from the grey tiles
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93-95, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
